entries.title: Exposition on Psalm 107 on psalms 107:38
entries.excerpt: "And He blessed them, and they were multiplied exceedingly, and their cattle were not diminished" [Psalm 107:38]. This standeth. For "the foundation of God standeth sure; because the Lord knoweth them that are His." [2 Timothy 2:19] They are called "beasts of burden," and "cattle," that walk simply in the Church, yet are useful; not much learned, but full of faith. Therefore, whether spiritual or carnal, "He blessed them."

entries.title: COMMENTARY ON THE GOSPEL OF JOHN 28:212-15 on psalms 107:38
entries.excerpt: "And he has placed there the hungry, and they made a city for their habitation," the church. There he sowed fields, according to the seed that fell on the beautiful and good ground and produced a hundredfold, and he planted vineyards, for the Lord's disciples are branches, which also "yielded fruit of produce, and he blessed them and they were multiplied exceedingly."
